Hi! You must be Patrícia. I am David, from the support team in Austin.
Hi David, nice to meet you! I am the Customer Success Manager for our premium clients in Brazil.
Great to meet you. So, what are you working on right now?
I am currently leading the onboarding for Bradesco, our biggest account. We are rolling out a new dashboard.
That sounds important. I am responsible for the deployment, so we will work closely together.
Perfect. Then you are my main point of contact for any technical scope questions.

Hi, everyone. My name is David, and I am a senior support engineer based in Austin, Texas. I work with customer success teams around the world. Right now, I am leading the technical side of a big rollout for our premium clients in Latin America. I am also the main point of contact for any deployment questions. Please feel free to reach out to me any time. I am really looking forward to working with all of you.

Hi, this is Priya from the support team in Bangalore. I am calling about the onboarding for your Bradesco account. We are currently setting up the new environment, and the deployment is almost ready. I would like to schedule a short call this week to align on the scope of the project. Could you let me know what time works for you on Thursday? Thank you so much, and talk soon.
